title: abelmoschus strictus
intro: Abelmoschus strictus, also known as the White Gourd, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abelmoschus strictus include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
